title: Alex’s Test
text:
Test post 🎉
This is a test blog post to confirm that my GitHub Pages site is correctly building and rendering content exported from a Jupyter notebook.
What I’m testing
Front matter is being read correctly (title/date/categories)
Markdown renders (headers, lists, bold text)
An image loads from my repo



Philadelphia skyline test image
